name: codex-lcm
description: Codex-native session-first lossless context memory with hook ingestion and MCP retrieval.

interface.shortDescription: Session-first lossless context memory for Codex
interface.longDescription: Codex LCM captures sanitized raw Codex hook events into append-only JSONL, builds a local SQLite FTS index, and exposes health, search, retrieval, note, and context-packing tools through MCP.
defaultPrompt: Pack recent Codex context for this task
